compiled_state.title: Write RED structural tests for DSO staged CI workflow template
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
N/A — This is the RED test task.

## Story DD Coverage
This task satisfies:
- DD4: unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## What
Create tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh — a behavioral test that verifies the structural properties of plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml.

Tests must FAIL (RED) before the template file exists (file-missing assertions ensure RED state).

## Test Approach
Given: plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml does not yet exist
When: tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh is run
Then: test exits non-zero (file missing), establishing RED state

Once the template exists:
Given: plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml exists with 4 staged jobs
When: the test parses the YAML and checks structural properties
Then: all assertions pass (GREEN)

## Test cases to implement (source tests/lib/assert.sh for assert_eq/assert_contains):
1. test_template_file_exists — fails when file missing (ensures RED)
2. test_yaml_is_parseable — python3 yaml.safe_load succeeds
3. test_four_required_jobs — jobs.lint-format, jobs.tests, jobs.llm-review, jobs.validate-ci all present
4. test_tests_job_needs_lint_format — jobs.tests.needs contains "lint-format"
5. test_llm_review_needs_tests — jobs.llm-review.needs contains "tests"
6. test_validate_ci_needs_tests — jobs.validate-ci.needs contains "tests"
7. test_lint_format_has_no_needs — jobs.lint-format does not have a needs field (it is the root)
8. test_no_dso_plugin_refs — template contains no reference to read-config.sh or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT
9. test_lint_format_uses_github_variables — lint-format step run command references ${{ vars. pattern
10. test_validate_ci_runs_validate_sh — validate-ci step run command contains validate.sh

## File to create
- tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh (executable: chmod +x required)

## .test-index Requirements
Two entries must be added to .test-index at repo root:
1. RED marker: plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml [test_template_file_exists]
   (Must be added BEFORE committing this RED test so the pre-commit test gate accepts the failing test)
2. Mapping entry: plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml: tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh
   (Required because the fuzzy match fails: "cidsostagedyml" is not a substring of "testcidsostagedtemplatesh")

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh
- [ ] Test exits non-zero when template does not exist (RED state verified)
  Verify: (rm -f plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml 2>/dev/null; bash tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0)
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker for ci-dso-staged.yml
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged\.yml \[test_template_file_exists\]' .test-index
- [ ] .test-index has mapping entry for ci-dso-staged.yml
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged\.yml:' .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: tests/lib/assert.sh, .test-index; exemplars read: tests/scripts/test-ci-generator.sh, tests/scripts/test-workflow-config-schema.sh) ✓
comments.author: Test
